title: Conversation-Context-Aware Follow-Through Insights
summary: Implemented full-conversation-aware Gmail and Slack follow-through classification, persisted posture-aware conversation context, softened Telegram heads-up copy when other participants already replied, and stabilized unrelated agent tests against dirty local test DB state.
next_action: No further implementation work is pending. Deploy and verify the heads_up follow-through language in production.

verification.notes: `mix precommit` passed on 2026-03-13 after implementing provider-native conversation context evaluation for Gmail and Slack, preserving heads_up posture through the insight pipeline, updating Telegram/action copy to say the conversation is moving when another participant already replied, and hardening two agent test modules against pre-existing local test DB rows.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented the conversation-context-aware follow-through feature end to end and passed the full repo verification gate.
open_questions: Whether heads_up should become a first-class UI badge or filter in a later product pass
resume_context.notes: The implementation now fetches full Gmail threads, inspects Slack reply history, classifies whether the thread is stalled, active, or resolved, and preserves that posture into persisted insight metadata so renderers do not need fresh provider fetches.

history.note: Initial draft created from repo context and the user's request for full-conversation-aware Gmail/Slack insight language.
Implementation began for shared conversation-context classification, Gmail thread fetches, Slack reply inspection, and posture-aware notification copy.
Completed the conversation-context-aware follow-through feature, verified it with `mix precommit`, and fixed local test isolation issues in agent-related suites uncovered during the final gate.
